leadText: Chili Sauce (Japanese: チリソース Chili Sauce) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment with a very spicy kick. It's thanks to Scovillain that this sauce gets its signature mouth-tingling burn.
